race.comment: Tricky little affair. Leaning to DIFFERENT GRAVY (1) who might just be able to improve again third up. He's clearly in need of a trip having run on well for fourth at Morphettville second up over 1800m, and an easy mid-prep trial win over 1400m should have him screwed down for the 2000m here. CLASSIC GEM (3) brings the clear best form into this, fourth in the G1 ATC Oaks last start. She's off five weeks and back in trip off what was her 'grand final' so to speak, but if she produces something like her best she's the one to beat. BUTHELEZI (5) was just behind BRAVE DANZA (4) at Caulfield Heath in April 29. BUTHELEZI was first up there having shown good ability in WA prior and can improve, BRAVE DANZA beat him home narrowly and also has claims. There are plenty of impressive last start maiden winners engaged, of all of them CATCH THE MOON (11) is the one that appeals at odds.
